// // This module implements a 4-bit XOR gate instead of an XNOR gate
module top_module (
	input [3:0] in0,
	input [3:0] in1,
	output reg [3:0] xnor_out);always_comb begin
		xnor_out = ~(in0 ^ in1);
	end
	
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-bit XOR gate instead of an XNOR gate
